programs.title: The Great British Bake Off
programs.desc: Another installment of the extremely popular show in which twelve confectioners with no professional experience compete for the title of the best.Every week, the competitors receive difficult tasks to verify their talent and culinary skills.Their struggles are assessed by the famous baker Paul Hollywood and the restaurateur Prue Leith, both of whom are very demanding and critical.Each task is time-limited.Time pressure is difficult to bear.The weakest competitors will quickly lose their chance to win the title of best confectioner.The show is hosted by Noeal Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programs.title: The Great British Sewing Bee: Wardrobe Staples Week
